# Data Model: badpixels


SDSS BOSS Bad Pixel Mask


## Contents
- [Basic Information](#basic-information)
- [Changelog](#changelog)
- [Example HDUS List](#example-hdus-list)
- [Notes](#notes)
- [Regrets](#regrets)
---

## Basic Information
SDSS BOSS Bad Pixel Mask (including hot pixels) from from a set of darks and biases

### Naming Convention
$SPECFLAT_DIR/[SPECFLAT_VER]/flats/badpixels-[MJD]-[BR][ID].fits or badpixels-59919-b2.fits.gz but with regex pattern matches

### Releases
IPL4, DR20

### Enviroments
SPECFLAT_DIR

### Approximate Size
67 KB

### File Type
FITS

### Generated by Product
idlspec2d - combinebpm.pro

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
1.1.1

### HDUS List for release DR20
  - [HDU0: PRIMARY](#hdu0-primary)

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another
 - DR20
   - from: IPL4
   - note: No changes

---
## Example HDUS List

### HDU0: PRIMARY
Bad Pixel Mask for BOSS Frame

#### HDU Type: IMAGE
#### HDU Size:  64 MB

##### Header Table Caption for HDU0
Key | Value | Comment | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| SIMPLE | True | conforms to FITS standard |
| BITPIX | -32 |  |
| NAXIS | 2 | number of array dimensions |
| NAXIS1 | 4096 | Number of positions along axis 1 |
| NAXIS2 | 4112 | Number of positions along axis 2 |
| EXTEND | True | Extensions may be present |
| V_ARCHON | 0.7.1a0 |  |
| SPEC | sp2 | Spectrograph name |
| OBSERVAT | LCO | Observatory |
| MJD | 59919 | Modified Julian Date |
| FLAVOR | bias | Image type |
| INTSTART | 2022-12-05T18:52:17.553 | Start of the integration |
| INTEND | 2022-12-05T18:52:20.749 | End of the integration |
| CAMERAS | b2 |  |
| CCD | b2 | CCD name |
| CCDID | ? | Unique identifier of the CCD |
| CCDTYPE | ? | CCD type |
| GAIN | 1.0 | CCD gain [e-/ADU] |
| RDNOISE | 2.7 | CCD read noise [e-] |
| CCDSUM | 1 1 | Horizontal and vertical binning |
| ARCHBACK | 00003FFF1A98CCCF | Archon backplane ID |
| ARCHBVER | 1.0.1092 | Archon backplane version |
| ARCHACF | BOSS_extra_purge_erase_v5.acf | Archon ACF file loaded |
| TELESCOP | LCO Du Pont | Sloan Digital Sky Survey |
| ARCHTEMP | 18.375 | Archon backplane temperature [degC] |
| CCDTEMP | -99.76 | Temperature of the sensor (HEATERX 11) |
| LN2TEMP | -181.15 | LN2 can temperature (HEATERX 11) |
| BUFFER | 1 | The buffer number read |
| CARTID | FPS-S | Instrument ID |
| CONFID | 10000661 | Configuration ID |
| DESIGNID | 192285 | Design ID associated with CONFIGID |
| FIELDID | 26696 | Field ID associated with CONFIGID |
| EQUINOX | 2000.0 | Equinox of celestial coordinate system |
| AIRMASS | 1.0 | Airmass |
| HA | 0.033333 | HA axis pos. (approx, deg) |
| M2ZROT | 0.0 | TCC SecOrient |
| T_OUT | 21.8 | Outside temperature deg C. |
| T_IN | 15.8 | Inside temperature deg C. |
| T_PRIM | 13.8 | Primary mirror temperature deg C. |
| T_CELL | 14.5 | Cell temperature deg C. |
| T_FLOOR | 11.8 | Floor temperature deg C. |
| T_TRUSS | 15.38 | Truss temperature deg C. |
| OFFRA | 0.0 | Absolute guider offset in RA |
| OFFDEC | 0.0 | Absolute guider offset in DEC |
| OFFPA | -375.0 | Absolute guider offset in PA |
| SEEING | NaN | Seeing from the guider [arcsec] |
| HEAR | 0 0 0 0 | HeAr lamps 1:On 0:Off |
| HARTMANN | Out | Hartmanns: Left,Right,Out |
| MECHORIX | -925.1 | Orientation in X axis [cm/s2] |
| MECHORIY | 221.2 | Orientation in Y axis [cm/s2] |
| MECHORIZ | 161.6 | Orientation in Z axis [cm/s2] |
| B2CAMT | 11.3 | B2 camera temperature [degC] |
| B2CAMH | 32.0 | B2 camera RH [%] |
| R2CAMT | 11.2 | R2 camera temperature [degC] |
| R2CAMH | 36.0 | R2 camera RH [%] |
| COLLT | 12.0 | Collimator temperature [degC] |
| COLLH | 34.0 | Collimator RH [%] |
| SPECMT | 25.5 | specMech temperature [degC] |
| VERSIDL | 8.8.0 | Version of IDL |
| VERSUTIL | 6.0.0dev | Version of idlutils |
| VERSREAD | v6_0_9 | Version of idlspec2d for pre-processing raw dat |
| VERSLOG | trunk 27531 | Version of SPECLOG product |
| VERSFLAT | Unknown | Version of SPECFLAT product |
| TWOPHASE | False |  |
| QUALITY | excellent |  |
| RDNOISE0 | 1.7082 | CCD read noise amp 0 [electrons] |
| PIXFLAT | None |  |
| BADPIXEL | None |  |
| BIAS STA | 00004514 | first bias exposure |
| BIAS END | 00004543 | last bias exposure |
| DARK STA | 00004544 | first dark exposure |
| DARK END | 00004546 | last dark exposure |
| BM0 | 0 | good to use |
| BM1 | 1 | > 10 sigma deviation, weaker |
| BM2 | 2 | saturated pixel, greater than 15000 in bias |
| BM4 | 4 | > 10 sigma deviation, stronger |
| BM8 | 8 | bad column |
| BM16 | 16 | warm bad column, ticket 1368,1369 |
| BM32 | 32 | by hand corrections |
